_comment: Day 1 captions config. Reads transcripts (in original take time), applies the same tighten transforms as 01-tighten.json, generates ASS subtitles in our cream/orange palette, burns them into final_unsped.mp4. Speedup is applied AFTER captioning so they speed up naturally with the audio.
_emphasis_note: Multi-word phrases auto-stay-together as chunks (AI agent, 30 days, every day, free guide, Claude plugin, day one→'DAY 1'). 'AI' alone removed so it pairs with 'agent'.
_group_phrases_note: Phrases that should stay together as one chunk but NOT get the emphasis color. Force chunking only.

style._font_note: drop fonts/main-bold.ttf at repo root to override (Inter, Montserrat, Plus Jakarta Sans recommended)
style._size_note: default 96pt; emphasis 96 × 1.15 = ~110pt. Bigger emphasis text draws the eye without color alone.
style._color_note: pure white — research consensus for default short-form captions
style._emphasis_note: Lighter salmon (was FF8C7A). RGB(255, 163, 149) — added 20% white to each channel. Softer pastel coral, still pink-leaning, less saturated. Easier on the eye for bigger text.
style._border_note: 3 = opaque pill behind text; 1 = outline only
style._alpha_note: 0x26 ≈ 85% opaque pill (slightly more solid than before for max contrast)
style._position_note: 73% from top — clears IG UI safe zone (bottom ~14% should stay clear for platform overlays). Bumped up from 78%.
style._replacements_note: render-time text swaps. 'day one' is what whisper transcribed; 'DAY 1' is what we want viewers to see (matches the CTA keyword).
